title: minmax~

messages.description: outputs minimum and maximum on float outlets
a non-0 value resets minimum and maximum
minimum level since startup or last reset
maximum level since startup or last reset
on bang: minimum level since startup or last reset
on bang: maximum level since startup or last reset

methods.description: resets minimum and maximum (to current input value)

body: [minmax~] outputs the minimum and maximum values (as signals and floats) of an input signal since the startup or a reset.
